data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for scoped state.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for scoped state (biz-wide, location-specific, subject-specific). However, the evidence provided does not include any details or confirmations regarding the existence or structure of the scoped state documents. The prior steps focus on booking and customer interactions, which do not address the specific requirement for scoped state, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of scoped state documents that are biz-wide, location-specific, or subject-specific.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and structure of scoped state documents.
